mapper.select: SELECT * FROM doctor ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT * FROM doctor WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO doctor (name, title, specialty, phone) VALUES (#{name}, #{title}, #{specialty}, #{phone})
mapper.update: UPDATE doctor SET name = #{name}, title = #{title}, specialty = #{specialty}, phone = #{phone} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM doctor ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT * FROM doctor WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM doctor WHERE name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
